summary: Songpa was tighter than 2024: UFP held 갑 (김웅 51.20) and 을 (배현진 50.46) by narrow margins; 송파 병 stayed DPK (남인순 52.48). All 3 races were within 5pp — the gu's most competitive cycle in years.

issues.label: Apartment / real-estate politics
issues.description: Jamsil/Olympic Park apartment belt drives conservative lean.
